text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity stepping into this bright, modern space. The glass barriers separate me from what looks like an exhibit or installation—a place inviting contemplation. The world here feels meticulously crafted, almost clinical, yet intentionally designed to provoke thought. As I approach the wall of the R+D space, the vivid colors and glowing screens create an atmosphere that is both artificial and strangely inviting. I am alert and reflective, sensing the intersection of artifice and authenticity, as if on the threshold of discovery in an environment where boundaries between observer and participant blur.
